name: login-and-switch
description: Runs the concrete account() calls — Microsoft login, add offline, switch active, or list who's logged in. The operation manage-accounts routes to, without the online-vs-offline decision itself. Use when the user actually wants to log in, add or switch accounts, or check the active one ("登录","换号","微软登录","离线账号","正版登录"); changing a skin/cape is set-skin.
body:
# Log in and switch accounts

Use `account(action, ...)` only — never shell/browser scripting/file editing.

- `account(action=list)` — logged-in accounts (username, type, active one).
- `account(action=microsoft_login)` — native OAuth dialog, no params.
- `account(action=add_offline, username)` — offline account, active by default.
- `account(action=select, username)` — switches active account.

Microsoft/正版 needed for online-mode servers, Realms, real skin/name. Offline is
username-only, can't join online-mode servers/Realms — only suggest offline if
user explicitly wants it or has no Microsoft account.

Microsoft login: call `account(action=microsoft_login)`, tell user "已打开登录窗口，请在弹出的窗口里
完成微软登录。" (interactive, you can't do it for them), then after they confirm,
`list` to verify the account appeared.

Don't: script a "login" via shell; create offline when Microsoft/正版 was asked
for; claim success before `list` confirms it.
